name: Clack///
subtitle: Turn any screen into a retro split-flap display
description: Turn any screen into a retro split-flap display. Send messages from your phone to a TV or monitor over WebRTC.
longDescription: Clack/// turns any screen into a retro split-flap display. Open the display on a TV or monitor, connect your phone as a remote control, and send messages that flip into place with authentic mechanical animations and sound effects. Powered by WebRTC peer-to-peer connections — no server, no account.
features: Split-flap display with mechanical flip animations
Configurable flip speed and stagger delay
TV mode with wake lock and multiplayer sync
